mapper.select: SELECT tam.id, tam.tag_id, tam.account_code, tam.account_name, tam.mapping_condition, tam.is_default, tam.priority, tam.confidence_boost, tam.created_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM tag_account_mappings tam JOIN tags_master tm ON tam.tag_id = tm.id ORDER BY tam.priority DESC, tam.account_code

SELECT tam.id, tam.tag_id, tam.account_code, tam.account_name, tam.mapping_condition, tam.is_default, tam.priority, tam.confidence_boost, tam.created_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM tag_account_mappings tam JOIN tags_master tm ON tam.tag_id = tm.id WHERE tam.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY tam.priority DESC

SELECT tam.id, tam.tag_id, tam.account_code, tam.account_name, tam.mapping_condition, tam.is_default, tam.priority, tam.confidence_boost, tam.created_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM tag_account_mappings tam JOIN tags_master tm ON tam.tag_id = tm.id WHERE tam.account_code = #{accountCode} ORDER BY tam.priority DESC

SELECT tam.id, tam.tag_id, tam.account_code, tam.account_name, tam.mapping_condition, tam.is_default, tam.priority, tam.confidence_boost, tam.created_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM tag_account_mappings tam JOIN tags_master tm ON tam.tag_id = tm.id WHERE tam.id = #{id}
